records.Subject: Group Strategy Review
records.Description: Annual group strategy review with Michael Jones and senior leadership. Confirmed appetite for expanded capacity across Financial Lines. Q3 renewal programme prioritised. Target GWP uplift of 15% discussed.

records.Subject: Casualty Programme Renewal
records.Description: Casualty renewal planning meeting with Anup Gupta. Three markets identified for competitive tender. Risk management improvements from last year noted by underwriters.

records.Subject: Q2 Renewal Review
records.Description: Q2 portfolio review with Amy Taylor. Discussed impact of warehouse fire on property renewal terms. Additional risk engineering report commissioned ahead of renewal.

records.Subject: Portfolio Strategy QBR
records.Description: Quarterly business review with Jennifer Wu. Reviewed YTD performance against targets. Agreed to explore additional Liability sub-limits for new manufacturing site.

records.Subject: Marine Cargo Underwriter Meeting
records.Description: Introductory meeting with Marine Cargo underwriter to explore new coverage for international shipments. Terms to be presented at next renewal.
